title: E-Commerce Checkout Redesign
summary: Reduced cart abandonment by 34% through a streamlined, mobile-first checkout flow.

sections.heading: Problem
sections.body: Users were dropping off at the payment step due to a cluttered, multi-page flow with unclear error states.

sections.heading: Approach
sections.body: Ran usability sessions with 12 participants, mapped the existing journey, and prototyped a single-page checkout with inline validation.

sections.heading: Outcome
sections.body: 34% reduction in cart abandonment. Mobile conversion up 21% quarter-over-quarter.
